name: Banished from the Hero's Party, I Decided to Live a Quiet Life in the Countryside
original_name: 真の仲間じゃないと勇者のパーティーを追い出されたので、辺境でスローライフすることにしました
overview: After being betrayed by the Hero’s party, Red hopes to start anew by opening an apothecary in a small town. He wants to keep his past life secret, but it won’t be easy...especially when a beautiful adventurer from his past asks to move in.
